prompt:
Subject:
Summer light reaching the fingertips

Main Subject:
A realistic 3:4 fashion portrait of an adult woman standing on a bright city sidewalk, extending one hand toward the camera. The subject occupies a large portion of the center of the frame. The extended right hand is prominently in the foreground, creating a natural depth of field with the face and body behind it.

Person and Expression:
A woman with a calm, mature presence. Long dark brown straight hair with thin bangs, with a few strands naturally falling on her cheeks. Bright, translucent skin with natural texture. Rose-beige lips, pale blush, delicate brown eye makeup. A gentle expression looking slightly downward at the lens with her head tilted slightly to the right.

Clothing and Pose:
A plain ivory-beige cap without logos. A short-sleeved, ribbed V-neck mini dress. The dress naturally follows the body line with delicate gathers. Weight shifted to the left leg. The right arm is extended toward the camera with fingers lightly curved. Elegant nail design with milky white and nude beige gradients, featuring small pearls and transparent stones.

Background and Lighting:
A clean urban sidewalk alongside modern buildings. Street trees on the far left and a modern building made of stone and glass on the right. Soft natural light from the top left creates highlights on the hair, cheeks, and shoulders. Subtle shadows under the chin and on the right side of the body.

Composition and Camera:
Vertical 3:4 aspect ratio. Low angle looking up from near the ground. High-precision portrait photography as if taken with a modern full-frame mirrorless camera. 35mm equivalent lens, F1.8, low ISO, Eye AF. Focus on the face and eyes while keeping the fingers and nails sharp, with a smooth bokeh background.

Texture and Style:
Outdoor portrait style from a high-end fashion magazine. Detailed rendering of every strand of hair, rib fabric, and nail decorations. Natural skin texture and complexion. Bright and clear tones with soft contrast.

Negative:
Underage appearance, unnatural face or eyes, extra/fused/missing fingers, distorted nails, broken joints, blurred hands, inconsistent shadows, excessive skin retouching, plastic-looking skin, brand logos, watermarks.

promptZh:
主题：
夏日阳光触及指尖

主体：
一张 3:4 的写实时尚人像，描绘了 一位成年女性 站在明亮的城市人行道上，向镜头伸出一只手。主体占据了画面的大部分中心位置。伸出的右手位于前景显眼处，与后方的面部和身体形成了自然的景深感。

人物与表情：
一位气质沉稳、成熟的女性。深棕色长直发，留着薄刘海，几缕发丝自然地垂在脸颊上。明亮、通透的肌肤，带有自然的纹理。玫瑰米色嘴唇，淡雅腮红，精致的棕色眼妆。表情温柔，头部微微向右倾斜，视线略微向下看向镜头。

服装与姿态：
一顶无标志的纯象牙米色鸭舌帽。一件短袖罗纹 V 领迷你连衣裙。 连衣裙自然贴合身形，带有精致的褶皱。重心移至左腿。右臂向镜头伸出，手指轻微弯曲。优雅的美甲设计，采用乳白色和裸米色渐变，点缀着小珍珠和透明宝石。

背景与光影：
现代建筑旁整洁的城市人行道。 最左侧是行道树，右侧是石材与玻璃构成的现代建筑。来自左上方的柔和自然光在头发、脸颊和肩膀上形成了高光。下巴下方和身体右侧有微妙的阴影。

构图与相机：
3:4 竖构图。从地面附近的低角度仰拍。高精度人像摄影，如同使用现代全画幅无反相机拍摄。35mm 等效镜头，F1.8，低 ISO，眼部自动对焦。焦点对准面部和眼睛，同时保持手指和指甲清晰，背景呈现平滑的虚化效果。

质感与风格：
高端时尚杂志的户外人像风格。对每一缕发丝、罗纹面料和美甲装饰进行细致渲染。自然的皮肤纹理和肤色。明亮清晰的色调，对比度柔和。

负面提示词：
未成年外观、不自然的面部或眼睛、多余/融合/缺失的手指、变形的指甲、关节断裂、模糊的手部、不一致的阴影、过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤、品牌 Logo、水印。
